LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT VICTOR PSHEVLOZKY, DAWN MAZUR'S NOTICE AND MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY WHERE DEFENDANTS RESIDE AND CONTRACT WAS CREATED. THERE IS NOTHING IN THE GUARANTY TO SUGGEST IT WOULD BE PERFORMED IN SAN FRANCISCO. NO FEES AWARDED.
